channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Single Rewrite Suffices: Empirical Lessons from Production Skill Description Optimization
item.description: A Single Rewrite Suffices: Empirical Lessons from Production Skill Description Optimization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Indi-RomCoM: Code-Mixed Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs on Romanized Indic-English Instructions
item.description: Indi-RomCoM: Code-Mixed Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs on Romanized Indic-English Instructions

item.description: Using AI Agents to Automate Black-Box Audits of Personalization Algorithms at Scale

item.description: When Calibration Rankings Reverse: Accuracy-Controlled Evaluation for Fair Comparison of LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When transformers learn "impossible" languages, what do they learn?
item.description: When transformers learn "impossible" languages, what do they learn?

item.description: Test-Time Verification for Text-to-SQL via Outcome Reward Models

item.description: Multilingual Polarization Detection Using Transformer-Based Models with Class Weighting and Threshold Tuning

item.description: Training Therapeutic Judges and Multi-Agent Systems for Human-Aligned Mental Health Support

item.description: Beyond Clean Text: Evaluating Encoder and Decoder Robustness for Bangla Event Detection in Noisy Text

item.description: Bridging Scientific Heritage: An Arabic--Russian Parallel Corpus and LLM Benchmark for Sustainable Knowledge Transfer

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Linguistic Distancing on Social Media: Indicators of Emotion Regulation Across Age Groups
item.description: Linguistic Distancing on Social Media: Indicators of Emotion Regulation Across Age Groups

item.description: From Propositional to Perceptual Asymmetry: Extending Frictive Policy Optimization to Asymmetric Partial Information Dialogue

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Measuring Judgment Quality in Natural-Language Explanations: Evidence from Forecasting Tournaments
item.description: Measuring Judgment Quality in Natural-Language Explanations: Evidence from Forecasting Tournaments

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Wait, am I Being Fair? Characterizing Deductive Stereotyping and Mitigating It with Fair-GCG
item.description: Wait, am I Being Fair? Characterizing Deductive Stereotyping and Mitigating It with Fair-GCG

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CORTEX: Token-Level Hallucination Detection in RAG via Comparative Internal Representations
item.description: CORTEX: Token-Level Hallucination Detection in RAG via Comparative Internal Representations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Truth or Sophistry? LoFa: A Benchmark for LLM Robustness Against Logical Fallacies
item.description: Truth or Sophistry? LoFa: A Benchmark for LLM Robustness Against Logical Fallacies

item.description: A Semantic-Layer-Mediated Agent for Natural Language to SQL over Heterogeneous Enterprise Databases

item.description: Reference-Based Prosody and Rhythm Evaluation for Spoken Dialogue Systems

item.description: Exploring the relationship between team institutional composition and novelty in academic papers based on fine-grained knowledge entities

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Building a Multimodal Dataset of Academic Paper for Keyword Extraction
item.description: Building a Multimodal Dataset of Academic Paper for Keyword Extraction

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Triospect: A Three-Dimensional Framework for Robust Statistical AI-Generated Text Detection Against Diverse Attacks
item.description: Triospect: A Three-Dimensional Framework for Robust Statistical AI-Generated Text Detection Against Diverse Attacks

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Reranking Hurts: Uncertainty-Based Gating for Few-Shot Reranking
item.description: When Reranking Hurts: Uncertainty-Based Gating for Few-Shot Reranking

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] What Counts as an Error? Dual-Reference Benchmarking for Atypical ASR
item.description: What Counts as an Error? Dual-Reference Benchmarking for Atypical ASR

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SeKV: Resolution-Adaptive KV Cache with Hierarchical Semantic Memory for Long-Context LLM Inference
item.description: SeKV: Resolution-Adaptive KV Cache with Hierarchical Semantic Memory for Long-Context LLM Inference

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TAG-DLM: Diffusion Language Models for Text-Attributed Graph Learning
item.description: TAG-DLM: Diffusion Language Models for Text-Attributed Graph Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Gated Multi-Graph Fusion via Graph Attention Networks for Alzheimer's Disease Detection
item.description: Gated Multi-Graph Fusion via Graph Attention Networks for Alzheimer's Disease Detection

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Can LLMs Imagine Moral Alternatives Beyond Binary Dilemmas?
item.description: Can LLMs Imagine Moral Alternatives Beyond Binary Dilemmas?

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Probing Stylistic Appropriation using Large Language Models: An Evaluation Framework for Copyright Infringement under EU Law
item.description: Probing Stylistic Appropriation using Large Language Models: An Evaluation Framework for Copyright Infringement under EU Law

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When the Database Fails: Prompting LLM Dialogue Agents for Safe Recovery in Task-Oriented Dialogue
item.description: When the Database Fails: Prompting LLM Dialogue Agents for Safe Recovery in Task-Oriented Dialogue

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LOPA: Enhancing Spoken Language Assessment via Latent Ordinal Prototype Alignment
item.description: LOPA: Enhancing Spoken Language Assessment via Latent Ordinal Prototype Alignment

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Joint discovery of governing partial differential equations from multi-source datasets by competitive optimization
item.description: Framework discovers shared governing equations from multi-source datasets using competitive optimization and neural surrogates.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Accelerometry-Derived Digital Biomarkers for Cardiometabolic Risk: A Population-Representative Tabular Benchmark with Uncertainty Quantification
item.description: Benchmark evaluates ML methods for predicting cardiometabolic biomarkers from accelerometry, finding TabPFN v2 performs best but reveals demographic fairness gaps.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Search to Synthesis: Training LLMs as Zero-Shot Workflow Generators
item.description: MetaFlow trains LLMs via meta-learning to generate reusable workflows, using supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning with execution feedback.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Why Do Few-Step Text Latents Fail When Image Latents Work? Non-Commitment at Sharp Categorical Readouts
item.description: Decoder sharpness, not training deficiency, explains why few-step deterministic generation succeeds for images but fails for text.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hierarchical Global Attention (HGA)
item.description: Hierarchical Global Attention reduces GPU memory for long-context transformers by routing tokens between host storage and GPU without retraining.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ReactionAtlas: Ab origine exploration of chemical reaction networks with machine learning
item.description: ReactionAtlas uses machine learning to map chemical reaction networks ab origine, discovering approximately 47,000 reactions from eight pre-biotic seeds.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Revocable Learned State via Process Sidecars
item.description: Method revokes learned model memory from earlier training stages while accounting for transformations introduced by later safety optimization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Predictable GRPO: A Closed-Form Model of Training Dynamics
item.description: First-principles model explains Group Relative Policy Optimization training dynamics, predicting group-size invariance and providing failure-mode diagnostics.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Gradient Smoothing: Coupling Layer-wise Updates for Improved Optimization
item.description: Gradient Smoothing: Coupling Layer-wise Updates for Improved Optimization

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Mind the Residual Gap: Probabilistic Downscaling under Real-World Bias
item.description: Mind the Residual Gap: Probabilistic Downscaling under Real-World Bias

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Partition-Guided Distance Saliency: Bridging Decision and Objective Spaces in Many-Objective Optimization
item.description: Partition-Guided Distance Saliency: Bridging Decision and Objective Spaces in Many-Objective Optimization

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Stationary-Distribution Theory for Triplet-Based Plateau Search in Random Forest Ensemble-Size Selection
item.description: A Stationary-Distribution Theory for Triplet-Based Plateau Search in Random Forest Ensemble-Size Selection

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Transferable Learned Temporal Prior for Transmission Reconstruction and Decision-Relevant Uncertainty in Real Outbreak Labels
item.description: A Transferable Learned Temporal Prior for Transmission Reconstruction and Decision-Relevant Uncertainty in Real Outbreak Labels

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Behavior Cloning is Not All You Need: The Optimality of On-Policy Distillation for Noisy Expert Feedback
item.description: Behavior Cloning is Not All You Need: The Optimality of On-Policy Distillation for Noisy Expert Feedback

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Personalizing Marketplace Policies with Competing Objectives and Constrained Experiments: Evidence from a Job Marketplace
item.description: Personalizing Marketplace Policies with Competing Objectives and Constrained Experiments: Evidence from a Job Marketplace

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Quality-Aware Modulation for Diffusion Transformers
item.description: Quality-Aware Modulation for Diffusion Transformers

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-informed Conditional Normalizing Flows for Angles-only Cislunar Orbit Determination
item.description: Physics-informed Conditional Normalizing Flows for Angles-only Cislunar Orbit Determination

item.description: Multistage Defer Trees for Hybrid Interpretability: If at First You Can't Succeed, Tree Again

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Estimating Supply Incrementality in Two-sided Marketplaces: A Causal Machine Learning Approach
item.description: Estimating Supply Incrementality in Two-sided Marketplaces: A Causal Machine Learning Approach

item.description: Offline Reinforcement Learning for Fluid Controls: Data-based Multi-observational Policy Extraction

item.description: Teaching LLMs to Recommend and Defer in Underrepresented Epilepsy Care

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Warp RL: Reshaping Base Policy Distributions for Dynamics Adaptation
item.description: Warp RL: Reshaping Base Policy Distributions for Dynamics Adaptation

item.description: Knowledge Distillation from Large Reasoning Models to Compact Student Models: A Case Study on the John O Bryan Mathematics Competition

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Fora: From Weight-Space to Function-Space Protection in Capability-Preserving Fine-Tuning
item.description: Fora: From Weight-Space to Function-Space Protection in Capability-Preserving Fine-Tuning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Explaining Machine Learning and Memorization with Statistical Mechanics
item.description: Explaining Machine Learning and Memorization with Statistical Mechanics

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Visualizing High-Dimensional Graph Embeddings via Informed Multi-View Projections
item.description: Visualizing High-Dimensional Graph Embeddings via Informed Multi-View Projections

item.description: Can Tabular In-Context Learners Generalize to Biomolecular Property Prediction?

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Bayesian Filtering Approach for Learning Lagrangian Dynamics from Noisy Measurements
